song.title: Wholly Yours
song.author: David Crowder
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C B C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G G/B C G I am full of earth, You are heaven’s worth . G/B C G I am stained with dirt, prone to depravity . G/B C G You are everything that is bright and clean|| . G/B C G/B The antonym of me, You are divinity . C G D/F# G/B But a certain sign of grace is this . C G From the broken earth, .G D/F# Flowers come up, .D Pushing through the dirt
[C] . C G D You are holy, holy, holy! . C G D All heaven cries “Holy, holy God!” . C G D You are holy, holy, holy! . C G D (G G/B C to verse 2) I want to be holy like you are!
[V2] You are everything that is bright and clean And You’re covering me with Your majesty .G/B C G D/F# And the truest sign of grace was this .G/B C G From wounded hands redemption fell down, .D/F# D Liberating man --- [B] .F C G But the harder I try, the more clearly can I . D/F# C Feel the depth of our fall and the weight of it all . G/B G And so this might could be the most impossible thing . D/F# C Your grandness in me making me clean . G D C G D Glory, Hallelujah! Glory, Glory, Hallelujah
[V3] .C G D Em So here I am, all of me, finally, everything . C G D Wholly, wholly, wholly . C G D I am wholly, wholly, wholly . C G D G G/B C I am wholly, wholly, wholly Yours
